testPageStructure.description: Verified test page contains 12 takt/dynamic-content-carousel blocks, all properly wrapped in takt/demo-container blocks

rendering.description: All 12 block instances render correctly on the frontend with proper DemoContainer wrappers

accessibility.description: Carousel blocks follow accessibility best practices

details.ariaLabeling: All carousels have proper aria-labelledby or aria-label attributes
details.autoplayControls: Loop + Autoplay variation includes pause/play button with proper labels
details.navigationControls: Navigation buttons present on 10 of 12 variations (2 intentionally disabled)
details.paginationControls: Pagination present on 10 of 12 variations (2 intentionally disabled)
details.loopBehavior: Loop mode enabled on variations 10 and 11 with proper data-swiper-slide-index attributes

blockAttributes.description: All block variations display correct attribute configurations

variationsVerified.note: Loop mode creates duplicate slides for seamless infinite scrolling
Includes pause/play button for accessibility compliance

build.reason: No build needed - test page content only (no code changes)

passedChecks: Test page contains exactly 12 takt/dynamic-content-carousel blocks
All 12 blocks properly wrapped in takt/demo-container blocks
Two new variations present: Loop Mode and Loop + Autoplay
All DemoContainer titles and descriptions render correctly
DemoContainer spacing consistent across all variations (py-8 sm:py-12)
Loop + Autoplay variation includes autoplay pause/play control button
Autoplay control has proper ARIA labels (data-label-pause, data-label-play)
Navigation buttons render correctly on enabled variations
Pagination renders correctly on enabled variations
Loop mode variations include data-swiper-slide-index attributes for cloned slides
All carousel instances have proper ARIA labeling
Empty state variation (Manual Selection) handles no content gracefully
No Pagination / No Navigation variation correctly disables controls
Long content edge case displays properly without layout breaks

notes.description: The Loop + Autoplay variation successfully demonstrates WAI-ARIA carousel compliance with autoplay pause/play controls
notes.context: This is the recommended pattern for carousels with autoplay, meeting WCAG 2.2.2 (Pause, Stop, Hide) requirements

screenshotsTaken.description: Verification screenshot of the Loop + Autoplay carousel showing the pause/play control button
